props.name: accent
props.description: Sets the style of accent on the container.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Sets the maximum height of the container.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the container.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Sets the minimum height of the container.

props.name: padding
props.description: Sets the amount of white space in the container.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: Sets the container and accent bar styling.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width of the container.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Content rendered in the container's actions area, typically buttons or controls.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Content rendered in the container's title/heading area.
